desc.en: Latin America's top university. Free tuition for all students.
desc.zh: 拉美顶尖大学，对所有学生免学费。

climate.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯亚热带气候。夏季（12-2月）炎热（25-35°C），冬季（6-8月）温和（8-16°C）。
climate.en: Buenos Aires subtropical climate. Hot summers (Dec-Feb, 25-35°C), mild winters (Jun-Aug, 8-16°C).

housing.zh: 无集中校园，学生在市内租房。月租约$300-600。生活成本相对低廉。
housing.en: No centralized campus; students rent in the city. ~$300-600/month. Relatively low cost of living.

employment.zh: 阿根廷和拉美地区最受认可的大学。法律、医学、社科毕业生在拉美就业广泛。
employment.en: Most recognized university in Argentina and Latin America. Law, medicine, social science graduates employed widely across Latin America.

healthcare.zh: 阿根廷公立医疗免费（包括外国人）。大学附属医院提供服务。建议额外购买私人保险。
healthcare.en: Argentina's public healthcare is free (including foreigners). University hospitals available. Private insurance recommended.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需高中成绩认证。主要西班牙语授课。
application.en: Apply via university website. High school credential verification needed. Primarily Spanish-taught.

safetyDetail.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯大城市需注意扒手和抢劫。选择安全社区居住。
safetyDetail.en: Buenos Aires is a big city—beware of pickpockets and mugging. Choose safe neighborhoods.

deadline.zh: 2月-3月（第一学期）/ 7月-8月（第二学期）
